suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the scrutiny validation skill guidance to avoid assuming Python YAML dependencies are installed; recommend reading `.factory/services.yaml` via committed repo commands or a dependency-free parser fallback.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: validation-foundation-automated-test-harness review noted the worker hit a missing `yaml` module while trying to parse `.factory/services.yaml`, then fell back to direct canonical commands.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify whether Playwright `test-results/` artifacts should be ignored or cleaned after browser smoke runs so workers can preserve a clean working tree consistently.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: validation-foundation-ci-validation-pipeline review observed untracked `test-results/` output after `pnpm test:browser`, with no current shared guidance on expected handling.

rejectedObservations.observation: Update the scrutiny validation skill guidance to avoid assuming Python YAML dependencies are installed; recommend reading `.factory/services.yaml` via committed repo commands or a dependency-free parser fallback.
